text:
TABLE: kentrehberi_parklar
TYPE: spatial polygon layer (Parklar)
DESCRIPTION:
Kent rehberi park verisi.
GEOMETRY:
- Geometry column: geom
- Geometry type: Polygon

TABLE: kentrehberi_yollar
TYPE: spatial line layer (Yollar)
DESCRIPTION:
Kent rehberi yol/ cadde verisi.
GEOMETRY:
- Geometry column: geom
- Geometry type: LineString
